headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
